name: cf-statement-capture-extension
description: Chrome extension for exporting Codeforces contest, Gym, and group contest statements as clean PDFs by ICPC Assiut.

scripts.check: npm test && node --check src/content/content.js && node --check src/background/service-worker.js && node --check src/print/print.js && node --check src/popup/popup.js && node --check scripts/smoke-check.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-icons.mjs && node --check scripts/package-extension.mjs
